title: corydalis ramosa var. vaginans
intro: Corydalis ramosa var. vaginans, also known as Chinese Corydalis or Yan Hu Suo, is a type of flowering plant native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid compounds such as dehydrocorybulbine and protopine. The health benefits of Corydalis ramosa var. vaginans include pain relief, improved sleep quality, and reduced anxiety and stress levels. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, including capsules, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to treat conditions such as menstrual cramps, insomnia, and fibromyalgia.
